soC.zh: 骁龙 855 / 麒麟 990 同等性能
骁龙 8 Gen 1 / 天玑 9000 及以上

device.zh: iPhone 12 Pro Max / iPad Air 3 或更新
device.en: iPhone 12 Pro Max / iPad Air 3 or newer

device.zh: iPhone 14 / iPad Pro M1 或更新
device.en: iPhone 14 / iPad Pro M1 or newer

faq.question: Can my PC run NTE?
faq.questionZh: 我的电脑能运行异环吗？
faq.answer: NTE requires at least an Intel i5-8400, 8GB RAM, and GTX 1060 for minimum settings. For a smooth experience at 60fps, we recommend i7-9700, 16GB RAM, and RTX 2060 or better. Make sure you have at least 90GB of free NVMe SSD space.
faq.answerZh: 异环最低需要 Intel i5-8400 处理器、8GB 内存和 GTX 1060 显卡。为了流畅运行 60fps，推荐 i7-9700 处理器、16GB 内存和 RTX 2060 或更好的显卡。确保至少有 90GB 的 NVMe SSD 可用空间。

faq.question: How many GB is NTE?
faq.questionZh: 异环游戏多大？需要多少存储空间？
faq.answer: NTE requires approximately 90GB on PC (NVMe SSD recommended) and 20GB on mobile (Android/iOS). An SSD is strongly recommended for faster loading times. Keep extra space available for future updates.
faq.answerZh: 异环 PC 版约需 90GB（推荐 NVMe SSD），移动端（Android/iOS）约需 20GB。强烈推荐使用 SSD 以获得更快的加载速度。建议预留额外空间用于后续版本更新。

faq.question: Can I play NTE on Android?
faq.answer: Yes, NTE is available on Android. Minimum requirements are Snapdragon 855 / Kirin 990 equivalent, 6GB RAM, Android 10+, and 20GB storage. For the best mobile experience, Snapdragon 8 Gen 1 or better with 8GB+ RAM is recommended.
faq.answerZh: 是的，异环支持安卓平台。最低配置要求为骁龙 855 / 麒麟 990 同等性能处理器、6GB 内存、Android 10+ 系统和 20GB 存储空间。推荐骁龙 8 Gen 1 及以上处理器搭配 8GB 以上内存以获得最佳体验。

faq.question: Is NTE available on iOS?
faq.answer: Yes, NTE supports iOS. Minimum requirement is iPhone 12 Pro Max or iPad Air 3 running iOS 15+. For recommended performance, iPhone 14 or iPad with M1 chip running iOS 16+ is suggested.
faq.answerZh: 是的，异环支持 iOS。最低要求 iPhone 12 Pro Max 或 iPad Air 3，系统 iOS 15+。推荐使用 iPhone 14 或搭载 M1 芯片的 iPad，系统 iOS 16+。

faq.question: Does NTE support 4K resolution?
faq.questionZh: 异环支持 4K 分辨率吗？
faq.answer: NTE supports various resolutions including 1080p, 1440p, and 4K on PC. For stable 4K gaming, you'll need a high-end GPU like RTX 3070 or better. Console and mobile versions run at their platform's native resolutions.
faq.answerZh: 异环 PC 版支持多种分辨率，包括 1080p、1440p 和 4K。要稳定运行 4K 画质，需要 RTX 3070 或更好的高端显卡。主机和移动端以各自平台的原生分辨率运行。

faq.question: Is NTE free to play?
faq.answer: Yes, NTE is a free-to-play game with optional in-app purchases. The game features a gacha system for obtaining characters and weapons. All content is accessible without spending money, though some premium items can speed up progression.
faq.answerZh: 是的，异环是一款免费游戏，提供可选的应用内购买。游戏采用抽卡系统获取角色和武器。所有内容都可以免费游玩，不过部分付费道具可以加速进度。

faq.question: What platforms is NTE available on?
faq.answer: NTE is available on PC (Windows), Android, iOS, Mac, HarmonyOS, and PlayStation 5 at launch. The PC version can be downloaded from the official website. Mobile versions are available on TapTap, App Store, and Huawei AppGallery. PS5 version is on PlayStation Store (free, no PS+ required).
faq.answerZh: 异环首发支持 PC（Windows）、Android、iOS、Mac、鸿蒙和 PlayStation 5 六大平台。PC 版可从官网下载，移动版可在 TapTap、App Store、华为应用市场下载。PS5 版在 PlayStation Store 免费下载（无需 PS+ 会员）。

faq.question: Will NTE be on Epic Games or Steam?
faq.questionZh: 异环会在 Epic Games 或 Steam 上架吗？
faq.answer: NTE is currently distributed through its official launcher. Availability on Steam or Epic Games Store has not been confirmed. Check official announcements for the latest platform information.
faq.answerZh: 异环目前通过官方启动器分发。是否在 Steam 或 Epic Games Store 上架尚未确认。请关注官方公告获取最新平台信息。
